prompt: I just ran swain init on my project, what now?

assertions.text: mentions-swain-command: Response mentions /swain as the entry point
mentions-plan-before-code: Explains the design-before-build / plan-before-code workflow
mentions-common-starting-points: Gives concrete examples of what to do next
not-overwhelming: Response is under 40 lines (concise orientation, not a manual)
